SELECT json.isarray(data) FROM test_json WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT json.isarray(data) FROM test_json WHERE data LIKE 'json%';
SELECT json.isarray(data) FROM test_json WHERE data IN (SELECT json '[10, 20]' UNION SELECT json '[30, 40]');
SELECT json.isarray(data) FROM test_json WHERE data IN (SELECT json '[1, 2, 3]' FROM test_json WHERE data IS NOT NULL);
SELECT MAX(json.isarray(data)) AS is_array_present FROM test_json;
CREATE TABLE another_json (id INT, data JSON);
INSERT INTO another_json VALUES (1, json '[5, 6]'), (2, json '[7, 8, 9]'), (3, json '["not an array"]');
SELECT id, json.isarray(data) FROM another_json WHERE json.isarray(data) = TRUE;
SELECT A.id, json.isarray(B.data) FROM another_json A JOIN test_json B ON A.id = 1;
SELECT data, json.isarray(data) FROM test_json WHERE json.isarray(data) = FALSE;
